System Architecture
Dashboard (Next.js 15)User Interface Layer
API (NestJS)Business Logic Layer
Supabase + RedisData & Queue Layer
OrchestratorInfrastructure Layer
Worker (Docker)Execution Layer
External APIsShopify, Meta, AutoDS

SupabaseDatabase

DockerInfra
